content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty recovering +0.88% to 24,208 with VIX cooling -3.27%, but global cues weak (Nasdaq -0.9%) and US Fed decision tonight is a binary event risk. Book is 55% deployed with +1.22% session P&L — priority is locking in gains via SL trails on winners, not adding new exposure into a Fed event. India VIX at 17.5 still elevated.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24335
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1048.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Holding +7.7%. Current SL 1048 already locks in ~6.5% gain — well above breakeven. Stock consolidating 1055-1068 intraday, VWAP support at 1056. No need to tighten further; let it run toward 1110. HOLD effectively but confirming SL placement."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down -2.6%. MCX gold pulled back below Rs 1.5L on Iran de-escalation hopes, but Fed decision tonight is the real catalyst — dovish surprise re-ignites gold. SL at 119 still ~2.4% away, well-defined risk. Hold as defensive hedge into Fed; reassess tomorrow."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1450.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "+4.0% unrealized, stock at all-time-high zone (52w high 1437.90 broken). Trailing SL up from 1448 to 1450 to lock more of the gain — still gives ~1.1% room from CMP 1468. Target 1500 intact. HUL Q4 tomorrow is sympathy catalyst."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 125,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stock broke down from 409 high to 402.70, breaking VWAP and approaching SL 401. Today's session showed clear distribution candle at 13:30. With Fed event risk and SL only 0.4% away, better to exit at 403 than get stopped at 401. Capital preservation. Q4 results May 15 — can re-enter on a cleaner setup."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1760.00,
      "new_target": 1810.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "+2.8% unrealized after 5.3x volume surge to 1776. Tightening SL from 1750 to 1760 to lock in better gain — still ~0.9% from CMP. Organon deal overhang persists but momentum strong today. Target 1810 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+0.5%, near 52w high 323. SL at 318 (~1.2% away) is tight enough. Board meeting tomorrow on fund raise + Q4 results May 19 are catalysts. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 475.00,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "+2.5% on +6.23% session, broke 52w high. Current SL 480 is actually ABOVE prudent trail (CMP 480.70) — too tight, risk of immediate stop-out on noise. Loosening to 475 — wait, cannot loosen SL. Keeping HOLD effectively. Actually current SL 480 is dangerous — let me reconsider: SL at 480 vs CMP 480.70 means 0.15% room — will stop on any wick. But system rejects loosening. Will issue HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "+0.3%. EX-DIVIDEND tomorrow (Rs 11/share record date April 30) — price will adjust ~1.8% lower at open. SL at 615 is above CMP 613, will trigger on ex-div mechanical drop. This is a known issue but cannot loosen SL. Accept the risk — fundamentals strong (57% EBITDA margin, zinc at $3,400+). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 195.00,
      "new_target": 218.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Filled at 200 today after +10.23% breakout on Q4 +68% PAT beat. Trailing SL up from 191 to 195 (2.5% risk vs entry) — tighter risk given stock is at 52w high and event-driven move could fade. Target 218 (~9% upside) intact. Strong NIM 6.2% leadership in private banks."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1048.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed well into profit (+6.5% locked). Let it run toward 1110."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge into Fed event. SL well-defined."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1450.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightened SL to 1450 to lock in more gain at all-time-high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Breaking down to SL; better to exit cleanly than get stopped 0.4% lower."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1760.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL after volume-driven move to lock gains."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 318.00,
      "reasoning": "Near 52w high with tight SL; awaiting board catalyst tomorrow."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 480.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at 480 vs CMP 480.70 is dangerously tight on a wick, but system does not allow loosening. Accept risk; fundamentals (Q4 +11%, dividend Rs 5.25) and momentum strong."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 615.00,
      "reasoning": "Ex-dividend tomorrow may trigger mechanical SL hit; cannot loosen. Accept."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 195.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening from 191 to 195 to reduce downside on event-driven 10% gap; still gives room above key support."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHARTIARTL Q4 results being announced today — wait for print before considering entry; binary event. BANDHANBNK already entered at 200. INDUSINDBK has SFIO/governance overhang despite Q4 turnaround — avoid. M&MFIN intraday data corrupted (Rs 2328 ghost prints) — skip until clean. ONGC near 52w high on crude $111; would prefer pullback to 290 area before entry, oil rally is geopolitically driven and reversible. NIFTYBEES, COALINDIA already represented in book.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 55% deployed with +1.22% unrealized session P&L. Three pending OPEN orders (GLENMARK, PHARMABEES, TATAPOWER) still working — leaving them alone, they can fill or expire. Five trail-SL modifications and one EXIT (NTPC) — focus on locking in gains ahead of US Fed decision tonight, NOT adding new positions. 5-day stats are concerning (13% win rate, profit factor 0.4x) — discipline on SL management is the fix. HINDZINC ex-div tomorrow is a known mechanical SL risk; accepting it consciously."
}
